Catalog Description

Special Topics in... Credit 0 to 4. Selected topics in an identified area of computer

science. May be repeated for credit. Prerequisite: Approval of instructor.

Additional Course Details

Algorithms for control-flow prediction including conditional branch prediction, indirect branch

prediction, return address prediction, and branch target buffer management. Addressing

technological constraints for implementation of branch prediction algorithms.

Course Prerequisites

Prerequisite/Corequisite(s):  Approval of instructor.

Course Learning Outcomes

Upon completion of this course, the learner will be able to:

• Explain and compare modern control-flow prediction algorithms

• Implement branch prediction in a detailed microarchitectural simulator

• Optimize branch predictors for a given class of workloads

Special Course Designation

None

Textbook and/or Resource Materials

This material Is: Optional

Notes:

No textbook is required. Papers will be distributed as needed.

Grading Policy

Letter grades will be assigned as follows: A is  ≥  90%; B is  ≥  80%; C is  ≥  70%; D is  ≥

considered late work and is exempt from the late work policy ( Student Rule 7 ).

Course Specific Late Work Policy

Late work is not accepted.
